prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: SON-CUTBRD12X15-VARZ-20PK-AO-FBA Product Type: CUTTING_BOARD Brand (from catalog): ASR Outdoor Existing Title: ASR Outdoor FCB-2110 Thin Flexible Kitchen Cutting Board Chopping Mat (20 Pack) Description: Tired of your old useless cutting boards?

Try this new universal cutting board for your kitchen. They are lightweight, durable and easy to maneuver; these clear chopping mats will significantly streamline all your prep-to-pan transport and protect your countertops while you are at it. Perfect for any kind of chopping job, you can easily bend the plastic cutting mat and use it as a funnel to move your prepped items to wherever they need to go: pots, pans, plates, blenders, storage containers and more.

The 12" x 15" cutting board surface also allows for plenty of workspace for rolling dough, slicing bread or assembling hors d'oeuvres for your next dinner party. The flexible cutting boards will not dull your knives and will protect your countertops when you’re doing any prep work.

Safe, hygienic and easy to clean, these plastic chopping mats are dishwasher safe or can be quickly cleaned by hand washing; they roll up quickly for easy storage when not in use, and each features a hole for convenient hanging. These plastic cutting mats are great for cutting and prepping foods that would normally stain wood chopping boards easily. They are extremely low maintenance in comparison to wood cutting boards, glass cutting boards or other types of traditional kitchen cutting boards.

In addition to food preparation, these universal cutting boards can also be used as a cutting surface for arts and craft projects, quilting or as a writing, drawing or art board and are a great option for taking with you on your next camping adventure in the outdoors.

These flexible cutting boards or chopping mats are an absolute must-have in your kitchen, whether you’re just learning how to cook or are a seasoned chef; No matter what kind of food preparation you're tackling in your kitchen, there's nothing these flexible cutting boards can't handle. Search Terms: non slip dinner table place mat clear flexible vegtable raw meat chopping pad kitchen knife food prep chef craft hobby DIY mat dinner placemat Features: - KITCHEN ESSENTIAL: Simple, reliable and hassle free, these dishwasher safe kitchen cutting board and chopping mat will streamline all your prep-to-pan food transport; the cutting mats will not retain any odor or dull any of your knives; surface will not crack or chip - DURABLE FOOD SAFE MATERIAL: Made from non-porous flexible plastic these kitchen cutting boards act as a barrier to moisture and bacteria perfect for safe food handling; they are also highly resistant to heat; using these plastic cutting board chopping mats in your kitchen will help to avoid cross-contamination - EASY TO CLEAN AND STORE: These kitchen flexible clear chopping board mats are dishwasher safe; chopping boards can be rolled up, laid flat or hung on a hook inside a cabinet for quick and efficient storage - MULTI-PURPOSE: In addition to kitchen food prep, flexible plastic cutting boards can be used as dining room place mats, a protective surface for arts and crafts projects, as a refrigerator shelf liner or as a writing, drawing or art board - SPECIFICATIONS: Flexible kitchen cutting mats overall size: 12 inch x 15 inch; made from polypropylene plastic; 0.5mm thick; dishwasher safe; available in multi-packs === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: ASR Outdoor 20-pk 12x15 Clear Flexible Cutting Board

openai.item_name: ASR Outdoor 20-Pk 12x15 In Clear Chopping Mats

anthropic.title_differentiation: Dishwasher Safe, Non-Slip, Food Safe Plastic, Easy Storage, Multi-Purpose Mat

openai.title_differentiation: Dishwasher Safe, Flexible Polypropylene, Knife Friendly, Non Porous, Easy Storage, Multi Purpose Use, Hanging Hole
